title: Trump to downsize U.S. military presence in Germany
summary_full: Germany said the U.S. decision was “anticipated” while NATO said it was working to understand the details of the plan, which coincides with a feud between the president and the German chancellor.
summary_public: Germany said the U.S. decision was “anticipated” while NATO said it was working to understand the details of the plan, which coincides with a feud between the president and the German chancellor.

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: Trump to downsize U.S. military presence in Germany
